creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-11-20 19:07:28 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-Log-Handler Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Log::Handler is an object-oriented handler for logging, tracing and
  debugging. It is very easy to use and provides a simple interface for
  multiple output objects with lots of configuration parameters.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Log-Handler/
  
  PR:             ports/140371
  Submitted by:   Sahil Tandon <sahil at tandon.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3691    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +39 -0     ports/devel/p5-Log-Handler/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/p5-Log-Handler/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/devel/p5-Log-Handler/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +24 -0     ports/devel/p5-Log-Handler/pkg-plist (new)
